name: Arkansas Contractors Licensing Board Licensed Contractor Search
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official contractor search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Arkansas contractor license and registration records exposed by the official board search
knownExclusions: This source is scoped to the Arkansas Contractors Licensing Board and does not represent every local permit, business registration, or trade credential in Arkansas.
Source-specific license classifications and inactive or historical coverage need further review before adapter work.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official bulk options if discovered before considering lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license or registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Arkansas contractor licensing lookup. Future work should research search result fields, license classes, and whether any official export is available.
maintainerNotes: Keep board scope explicit and do not imply all Arkansas skilled-trade or local contractor authorizations are covered.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
